Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a larger project, which can encompass multiple cases, often synchronized from PLM data sources (e.g., FAA / FAI projects).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Project entity.

name.description: The name or title of the project.

description.description: A detailed description of the project objectives and scope.

type.description: The classification of the project, e.g., 'FAA', 'FAI', 'Research', 'Standard'.

startDate.description: The date and time when the project officially started.

endDate.description: The planned date and time for the project completion.

actualEndDate.description: The actual date and time when the project was completed. This is only populated after completion.

status.description: The current status of the project, e.g., 'Initiated', 'In Progress', 'On Hold', 'Completed'.

Equipment.title: Equipment
Equipment.description: Represents a piece of laboratory equipment, including its status, location, maintenance schedule, and availability for use.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Equipment entity.

name.description: The name or common designation of the laboratory equipment.

serialNumber.description: The unique serial number identifying the specific equipment unit.

model.description: The specific model designation of the equipment.

location.description: The physical location of the equipment within the laboratory (e.g., 'Lab 101, Bench A').

status.description: The current operational status of the equipment, e.g., 'Operational', 'Under Maintenance', 'Broken', 'Calibrating'.

lastMaintenanceDate.description: The date and time of the last maintenance performed on the equipment.

nextMaintenanceDate.description: The date and time of the next scheduled maintenance for the equipment.

isAvailable.description: Indicates if the equipment is currently available for use and not scheduled for other tasks.

isMultiChannel.description: Indicates if the equipment supports multiple simultaneous work orders (multi-channel booking).

Case.title: Case
Case.description: Represents an individual laboratory case or task, tracking its status, priority, assignments, and associated resources to ensure efficient progress management.

name.description: The name of the case (名稱).

status.description: The current status of the case (狀態).

creator.description: The person who created the case (建立者).

workOrderId.description: The work order number (工服單號).

requiredDate.description: The required completion date (需要日期).

receptionDate.description: The date the case was received (收件日期).

estimatedCompletionDate.description: The estimated completion date (預計測試完成日期).

labManager.description: The name of the assigned lab manager/engineer (檢測者).

testItemsCount.description: The total number of items to be tested (應測項目數).

startDate.description: The date testing started (開始日期).

actualCompletionDate.description: The actual completion date (完成日期).

completedItemsCount.description: The number of items that have been tested (完成項目數).

projectId.description: The main project number this case belongs to (專案編號).

submissionOrder.description: The submission order or sequence number (送件順序).

testDetails.description: Specific details for different test types (測試項目).

other.description: Other test details (測試其他項目).

passCount.description: Number of items that passed testing (合格).

failCount.description: Number of items that failed testing (不合格).

naCount.description: Number of items not applicable for testing (不判定).

auditTime.description: The time the audit was completed (完成審核時間).

cost.description: The cost associated with the case (費用).

MaintenanceRecord.title: Maintenance Record
MaintenanceRecord.description: Represents a single equipment maintenance task.

equipmentName.description: The name of the equipment being maintained.

equipmentId.description: The unique ID of the equipment being maintained.

estimatedCompletionDate.description: The estimated date for maintenance completion.

engineerName.description: The name of the assigned engineer.

status.description: The status of the maintenance, e.g., '設備保養', '設備保養完成'.

Engineer.title: Engineer
Engineer.description: Represents a lab engineer or staff member.

id.description: Unique identifier for the engineer, often their name.

MachineSchedule.title: Machine Schedule
MachineSchedule.description: Represents a single booking for a piece of equipment on a specific date.

bookingId.description: ID for a block of related schedules.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the schedule was last updated.

RoutineWork.title: Routine Work
RoutineWork.description: Represents a monthly routine task assignment for an engineer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the routine work record.

yearMonth.description: The month of the task, in YYYY-MM format.

taskCategory.description: The category of the routine task.

engineerName.description: The name of the assigned engineer.

RoutineWorkTask.title: Routine Work Task
RoutineWorkTask.description: Represents a category of routine work, used as a column in the schedule.

id.description: Unique identifier for the task category.

name.description: The name of the task category.

order.description: The display order for the task column.

ProjectNote.title: Project Note
ProjectNote.description: A note or comment related to a specific project or work order.

workOrderId.description: The work order ID this note is associated with.

author.description: The person who wrote the note.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the note was created.

/engineers/{engineerId}.description: Stores all lab engineers and staff members.

/routine-work-tasks/{taskId}.description: Stores the categories for routine work.

/notes/{noteId}.description: Stores all notes related to projects/work orders.
